name: Elastic Cloud
description: Managed Elasticsearch and Kibana. Monitor deployments and cluster health.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Elastic Cloud at https://cloud.elastic.co
2. Go to Organization → API keys
3. Click 'Create API key'
4. Select 'Organization viewer' role (minimum)
5. Copy the generated key and paste below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Elastic Cloud console → Organization → API keys. Create an API key with at least 'Organization viewer' role.

checks.name: Elastic Cloud App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Elastic Cloud API is accessible.

checks.name: Elastic Cloud Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Elastic Cloud.
